date.description: Daily trading-date index. Aligned to the NYSE calendar; forward-filled from last observation for non-trading days when consumer needs a continuous index.

hy_ig_spread.description: ICE BofA US High Yield OAS minus ICE BofA US Corporate OAS, expressed in basis points. Widening signals rising credit stress; compression signals improving risk appetite.

hy_ig_mom_63d.description: Rate-of-change of hy_ig_spread over 63 trading days (one quarter), measured as the difference in basis points. Positive = spread widened over 3M (bearish); negative = spread tightened (bullish).

spy.description: SPDR S&P 500 ETF adjusted close price in USD. Target asset for this pair.

spy_fwd_63d.description: Forward-looking 63-trading-day total return of SPY, expressed as a decimal (0.05 = +5%). Used as the dependent variable in forward-return regressions against hy_ig_mom_63d.
